parameters.content:
## Automate Cold Email Follow-ups
Streamline your outreach sequence by automatically sending personalized follow-ups based on lead status.


### How it works
1. Schedule daily trigger execution.
2. Fetch leads from Google Sheets.
3. Filter active, non-replied leads.
4. Route leads to specific email stages.
5. Send personalized emails via ZeptoMail.
6. Update sheet status and next steps.


### Setup
1. Connect your Google Sheets account.
2. Connect your Zoho ZeptoMail account.
3. Update Google Sheet ID and Range.
4. Set your custom calendar link in Code nodes.
5. Install required community nodes (see Important section).


### Customization
Consolidate user-specific values in a Set node at the workflow start for easy configuration.


### Important
⚠️ This workflow requires a self-hosted n8n instance. Community nodes used: n8n-nodes-zohozeptomail.zohoZeptomail

## 1. Trigger & Data Sync
Fetch daily leads and filter by status.

## 2. Processing & Routing
Evaluate lead stage and build dynamic email templates.

## 3. Delivery & Updates
Send emails via ZeptoMail and update sheet logs.
